About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals an exceptionally strong performer in TNGX, which ranks #1 with a composite momentum score of 97.8 out of 100—driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes, most notably 860% over one year and 174.49% over six months. TNGX passes all technical gates (above the 30, 50, 100, and 200-day SMAs) and demonstrates remarkably consistent ratio progression, with each timeframe's return roughly 2-3x larger than the prior period, suggesting sustained rather than volatile momentum. In contrast, LINC ranks second with solid but more modest returns (155.65% one-year, 83.74% six-month) and a weaker bad_spy_score of 2.49 versus TNGX's 1.32, indicating LINC has underperformed on market downturn days. Both securities maintain full SMA alignment and four-pass ratio consistency, but the magnitude of TNGX's outperformance—particularly its 840% relative advantage over SPY on a one-year basis—sets it apart as the dominant momentum candidate in today's scan.
